pages.text: This book is meant to solve the exact problem your players keep running into: short tooltips can sound cool without being fully self-explanatory.$(br2)Use the later sections for $(l)recipes$(), $(l)loot and forging paths$(), $(l)plain-English effect explanations$(), and the difference between $(l)dormant$() and $(l)awakened$() states.

$(l)Terminology used in this book$()$(br)$(li)Dormant: base power, usable without being Branded$(li)Awakened: the stronger Oath-powered version of a dormant item$(li)Renewal: a player-facing term for regeneration, emergency sustain, or recovery granted by certain relics$(li)Heating Up / Heat: the Ember Seed's internal resource$(li)Impact: the Colossus Heart's stored retaliation power
